content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms from autonomous ICM agents can be repurposed to prioritize which new unlabeled data gets stored in cutting-edge 2024-2025 active learning agent memory architectures, creating self-organizing memory systems that grow only the most epistemically useful content without external human labeling prompts. This shifts active learning from a task-specific data selection loop to an autonomous agent trait that aligns memory growth with the agent’s inherent exploratory goals.
